attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 DRVD_POS.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY           ,
 DRVD_POS.SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT,
 DRVD_POS.SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT,
 DRVD_POS.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 DRVD_POS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 DRVD_POS.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
 DRVD_POS.ADJUSTMENT_DATE,
 DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
 DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
 DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
 DRVD_POS.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
 DRVD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 DRVD_POS.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG,
 DRVD_POS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 DRVD_POS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 DRVD_POS.DESCRIPTION,
 DRVD_POS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
 DRVD_POS.SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,
 DRVD_POS.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,
 DRVD_POS.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME,
 DRVD_POS.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG,
 DRVD_POS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,
 DRVD_POS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 DRVD_POS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
 DRVD_POS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 DRVD_POS.PRODUCT_KEY,
 DRVD_POS.PROCESS_DATE,
 DRVD_POS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 DRVD_POS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 DRVD_POS.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG,
 DRVD_POS.ADJUSTMENT_QTY,
 DRVD_POS.DV_LATEST_FLG,
 DRVD_POS.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  , 
 DRVD_POS.TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
 DRVD_POS.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD   ,        
 DRVD_POS.POS_OFFSET_FLG          ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,         
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 WI.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT        ,
 DRVD_POS.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT  ,
 DRVD_POS.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
DRVD_POS.DV_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
 DRVD_POS.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
 DRVD_POS.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,DRVD_POS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,DRVD_POS.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
 ,DRVD_POS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,DRVD_POS.DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT AS DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,DRVD_POS.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
 , DRVD_POS.DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT AS GLBL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
 , DRVD_POS.DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT AS GLBO_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
  /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, DRVD_POS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, DRVD_POS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, DRVD_POS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,DRVD_POS.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS DRVD_POS, 
 (SELECT DISTINCT PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_SCA_REP_INCR WHERE SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N') WI
 WHERE WI.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=DRVD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
   AND WI.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG=DRVD_POS.POS_OFFSET_FLG
   AND WI.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT=DRVD_POS.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT
   AND DRVD_POS.DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ) + COALESCE( SM_TAB.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_RECORD_NUM_INT,0) AS SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT,
                 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ) + COALESCE(SM_TAB.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_SEQ_NUM_INT,0) AS SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT,
                                                 BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER   ,        
                                                  SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE ,       
                                                             SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE ,  
                                                             ADJUSTMENT_DATE  ,             
                                                             EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
                                                             EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
                                                             EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT ,
                                                             FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE  ,        
                                                             BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,     
                                                             DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG ,      
                                                             SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,          
                                                             'DP' AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE  ,             
                                                             DESCRIPTION   ,                
                                                             SALES_CHANNEL_CODE ,           
                                                             SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE ,    
                                                             CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG  ,        
                                                             SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME,     
                                                             SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG  ,        
                                                             BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE ,      
                                                             BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  ,   
                                                             BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ,  
                                                             DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
                                                             PRODUCT_KEY      ,             
                                                             PROCESS_DATE    ,              
                                                             USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              
                                                             USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,              
                                                             CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME  ,         
                                                             CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,  
                                                             DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG ,   
                                                             DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  ,           
                                                             DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG  ,    
                                                             ADJUSTMENT_QTY  ,              
                                                             DV_LATEST_FLG,
                                                             POS_OFFSET_FLG,
                                                             NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT  ,
                                                             /*INCLUDED THE BELOW COLUMNS ASPART OF Q2FY15*/
                                                             BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
                                                             TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
                                                             ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
                 SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT  ,
                 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
                                                             DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
                                                             POS_RETURN_ROLE ,
                                                             /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/                                                                     
 DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
                LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     ,
                DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT    
,POB_TYPE_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
 , RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 , RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,COALESCE(DV_CONTRACT_DURATION,0) AS DV_CONTRACT_DURATION 
 ,COALESCE(DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG,'=') AS DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
 ,COALESCE(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,0) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,COALESCE(DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT,0) AS DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, GLBL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
, GLBO_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
   /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 FROM
 (
 SELECT
                                                             DRVD_POS.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,       
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,        
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE, 
                 CAST(DRVD_WI.LAST_UPDATED_DTM AS DATE) AS ADJUSTMENT_DATE,                                               
                                                             (DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*-1) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
                                                             (DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*-1) AS EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
                                                             (DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*-1) AS EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT, 
                                                             'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,         
                                                             DRVD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,     
                                                             DRVD_POS.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG,       
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
                                                             'DP' AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE,           
                 (CAST(LAST_UPDATED_DTM AS DATE) (FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'))  || 'NEW POS'  AS DESCRIPTION ,                                                
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,            
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,     
                                                             DRVD_POS.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,
                 DRVD_WI.LAST_UPDATED_DTM AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME,                                                     
                                                             DRVD_POS.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG,         
                                                             'Fiscal Year' AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,     
                                                             PD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,    
                                                  PD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,   
                                                             PD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
                                                             DRVD_POS.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
                                                             PD.PROCESS_DATE ,                          
                                                             CASE WHEN NP_NPF_ELC.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' OR ( NP_NPF_ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NP_NPF_ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND NP_NPF_ELC.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT ='Y' ) THEN 'N' ELSE DRVD_POS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG END AS DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,  
                                                             CASE WHEN NP_NPF_ELC.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' OR ( NP_NPF_ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NP_NPF_ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND NP_NPF_ELC.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT ='Y' ) THEN 'N' ELSE DRVD_POS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG END AS DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,            
                                                             CASE WHEN NP_NPF_ELC.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' OR ( NP_NPF_ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NP_NPF_ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND NP_NPF_ELC.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT ='Y' ) THEN 'N' ELSE DRVD_POS.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG END AS DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG,   
                                                             (DRVD_POS.ADJUSTMENT_QTY*-1) AS ADJUSTMENT_QTY,
                                                             'N' AS DV_LATEST_FLG,
                                                             DRVD_POS.POS_OFFSET_FLG,
                                                             DRVD_WI.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT ,
                                                             /*INCLUDED THE BELOW COLUMNS ASPART OF Q2FY15*/
                                                             BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
                                                             TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
                                                             ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD ,
                 SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
                 /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
                                                             DRVD_POS.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD  ,
                                                             DRVD_POS.POS_RETURN_ROLE,
                                                             /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/                                                      
 (DRVD_POS.DV_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*-1) AS DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
       (DRVD_POS.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*-1) AS   LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
       (DRVD_POS.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT*-1) AS DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT      
,DRVD_POS.POB_TYPE_CD
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
/* ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT*/
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,DRVD_POS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION

 --,DRVD_POS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,DRVD_POS.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
,(DRVD_POS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*-1) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,(DRVD_POS.DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT*-1) AS DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,DRVD_POS.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, (DRVD_POS.DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT*-1) AS GLBL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
, (DRVD_POS.DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*-1) AS GLBO_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, DRVD_POS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, DRVD_POS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, DRVD_POS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,DRVD_POS.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS DRVD_POS, 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_SCA_REP_INCR 
 WHERE SOURCE_DELETED_FLG <> 'Y' 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG ORDER BY END_TV_DTM DESC ) = 1) DRVD_WI, 
 (SELECT PROCESS_DATE,
 BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
 (BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDC,
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
 WHERE PDC.PROCESS_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE ) PD,
                                 
 ( SELECT NP.ITEM_KEY, NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD, NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, ELC.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT
 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF      
 ON NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
 
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDBU ELC  /*NP, NPF and ELC Joins added as part of Q2FY16 - CDBU - SA (Scientific Atlanta) Changes for CORP BOOKINGS FLAG, REVENUE RECOGNITION FLAG and NET SPREAD FLAG Columns */
 ON NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
 AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ) NP_NPF_ELC
                                 
 WHERE DRVD_WI.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = DRVD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 AND DRVD_WI.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = DRVD_POS.POS_OFFSET_FLG 
 AND DRVD_WI.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT  <> DRVD_POS.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT
 AND DRVD_POS.DV_LATEST_FLG='Y'
 AND NP_NPF_ELC.ITEM_KEY = DRVD_POS.PRODUCT_KEY
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
                                                             DRVD_POS.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER,       
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,        
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,   
                                                             CAST(DRVD_WI.LAST_UPDATED_DTM AS DATE) AS ADJUSTMENT_DATE,
                                                             (DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*-1) AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
                                                             (DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*-1) AS EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT,
                                                             (DRVD_POS.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT*-1) AS EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT, 
                                                             'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,         
                                                             DRVD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,     
                                                             DRVD_POS.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG,       
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
                                                             'DP' AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
                 (CAST(LAST_UPDATED_DTM AS DATE) (FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'))  || 'NEW POS'  AS DESCRIPTION ,                                                
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,            
                                                             DRVD_POS.SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,     
                                                             DRVD_POS.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG,
                 DRVD_WI.LAST_UPDATED_DTM AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME,                                                     
                                                             DRVD_POS.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG,         
                                                             'Fiscal Year' AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,     
                                                             PD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,    
                                                             PD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,   
                                                             PD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
                                                             DRVD_POS.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
                                                             PD.PROCESS_DATE ,                          
                                                             CASE WHEN NP_NPF_ELC1.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' OR ( NP_NPF_ELC1.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NP_NPF_ELC1.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND NP_NPF_ELC1.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT ='Y' ) THEN 'N' ELSE DRVD_POS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG END AS DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,  
                                                             CASE WHEN NP_NPF_ELC1.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' OR ( NP_NPF_ELC1.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NP_NPF_ELC1.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND NP_NPF_ELC1.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT ='Y' ) THEN 'N' ELSE DRVD_POS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG END AS DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,            
                                                             CASE WHEN NP_NPF_ELC1.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' OR ( NP_NPF_ELC1.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NP_NPF_ELC1.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND NP_NPF_ELC1.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT ='Y' ) THEN 'N' ELSE DRVD_POS.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG END AS DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG,  
                                                             (DRVD_POS.ADJUSTMENT_QTY*-1) AS ADJUSTMENT_QTY,
                                                             'N' AS DV_LATEST_FLG,
                                                             DRVD_POS.POS_OFFSET_FLG,
                                                             DRVD_WI.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT,
                                                             /*INCLUDED THE BELOW COLUMNS ASPART OF Q2FY15*/
                                                             BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
                                                             TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
                                                             ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD ,
                                                             SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
                                                             /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
                                                             DRVD_POS.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD  ,
                                                             DRVD_POS.POS_RETURN_ROLE,
                                                             /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/  
 (DRVD_POS.DV_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*-1) AS DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
       (DRVD_POS.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*-1) AS   LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
       (DRVD_POS.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT*-1) AS DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
,DRVD_POS.POB_TYPE_CD               
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
/* ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT*/
 ,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,DRVD_POS.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,DRVD_POS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION

 --,DRVD_POS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,DRVD_POS.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
,(DRVD_POS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*-1) AS  DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,(DRVD_POS.DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT*-1) AS DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,DRVD_POS.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
,(DRVD_POS.DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT*-1) AS GLBL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT 
,(DRVD_POS.DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT*-1) AS GLBO_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
     /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, DRVD_POS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, DRVD_POS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, DRVD_POS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,DRVD_POS.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS DRVD_POS, 
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_SCA_REP_INCR 
 WHERE SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT , DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG ORDER BY END_TV_DTM DESC ) = 1) DRVD_WI, 
 (SELECT PROCESS_DATE,
 BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
 BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
 (BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDC,
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
 WHERE PDC.PROCESS_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE )PD,
 
 ( SELECT NP.ITEM_KEY, NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE,NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD, NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, ELC.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT
 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF      
 ON NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
 
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDBU ELC  /*NP, NPF and ELC Joins added as part of Q2FY16 - CDBU - SA (Scientific Atlanta) Changes for CORP BOOKINGS FLAG, REVENUE RECOGNITION FLAG and NET SPREAD FLAG Columns */
 ON NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
 AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ) NP_NPF_ELC1
 
 WHERE DRVD_WI.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = DRVD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 AND DRVD_WI.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = DRVD_POS.POS_OFFSET_FLG
 AND DRVD_POS.DV_LATEST_FLG = 'Y'
 AND NP_NPF_ELC1.ITEM_KEY = DRVD_POS.PRODUCT_KEY ) DRVD_WI_R,
           
 (SELECT MAX(POS_ADJ_DETAIL_RECORD_NUM_INT) AS POS_ADJ_DETAIL_RECORD_NUM_INT, 
 MAX(POS_ADJ_DETAIL_SEQ_NUM_INT) AS POS_ADJ_DETAIL_SEQ_NUM_INT 
 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS
 )SM_TAB

SELECT 
SM.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY        ,
SM.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_RECORD_NUM_INT  ,
SM.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_SEQ_NUM_INT   ,
BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER           	,
SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        	,
SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE   	,
ADJUSTMENT_DATE               	,
EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT	,
EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT	,
EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 	,
FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          	,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     	,
DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG       	,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           	,
ADJUSTMENT_CODE               	,
DESCRIPTION                   	,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            	,
SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE     	,
CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG          	,
SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME     	,
SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG          	,
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE       	,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 	,
PRODUCT_KEY                   	,
PROCESS_DATE                  	,
WI_F_R.EDW_CREATE_USER          ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER               	,
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           	,
EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           	,
DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    	,
DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             	,
DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG      	,
ADJUSTMENT_QTY                	,
DV_LATEST_FLG                 	,
BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   	,
TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY	,
ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD           	,
POS_OFFSET_FLG                	,
NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT           ,
SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
POS_RETURN_ROLE,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/	
 DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT AS DV_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
 LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
 DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
POB_TYPE_CD
,'='  AS ACTION_CODE1             ,
'='  AS DML_TYPE1                

 /* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 --,DRVD_POS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
  /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
 , DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
 , DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
  /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 FROM
(
SELECT 
SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT          	,

BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER           	,
SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        	,
SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE   	,

FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          	,

DESCRIPTION                   	,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            	,
SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE     	,
CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG          	,
SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME     	,
SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG          	,
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE       	,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 	,
PRODUCT_KEY                   	,
PROCESS_DATE                  	,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER               	,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           	,
DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    	,
DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             	,
DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG      	,
ADJUSTMENT_QTY                	,
DV_LATEST_FLG                 	,

BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
POS_OFFSET_FLG                	,
NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT           ,
SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT ,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
POS_RETURN_ROLE,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/		
 DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
POB_TYPE_CD
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
  /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
 , GLBL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
 , GLBO_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT AS DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
  /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_SCA_POS_DTL_F

UNION 

SELECT 
SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT          	,
SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT        	,
BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER           	,
SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        	,
SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE   	,
ADJUSTMENT_DATE               	,
EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT	,
EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT	,
EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 	,
FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          	,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     	,
DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG       	,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           	,
ADJUSTMENT_CODE               	,
DESCRIPTION                   	,
SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            	,
SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE     	,
CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG          	,
SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME     	,
SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG          	,
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE       	,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     	,
BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    	,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 	,
PRODUCT_KEY                   	,
PROCESS_DATE                  	,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER               	,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           	,
DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    	,
DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             	,
DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG      	,
ADJUSTMENT_QTY                	,
DV_LATEST_FLG                 	,
/* REMOVED THE DEFAULT VALUES FOR THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF Q2FY15 */
BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,
ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD,
POS_OFFSET_FLG                	,
NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT           ,
SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT    	,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD,
POS_RETURN_ROLE,
/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/	
 DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
POB_TYPE_CD
/* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
 ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
 ,DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
 ,DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
 , GLBL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT AS DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
 , GLBO_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT AS DV_GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
  /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_SCA_POS_DTL_R) WI_F_R
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS  SM
ON WI_F_R.SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT = SM.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_RECORD_NUM_INT 
AND WI_F_R.SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT = SM.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_SEQ_NUM_INT

SELECT	
(RANK() OVER (ORDER	BY SPAD.SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT, SPAD.SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT)  +  SMPOS_MAX.MAX_POS_SGK_VAL) AS ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY,
SPAD.SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT,
SPAD.SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT,
USER AS  EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS  EDW_CREATE_DTM
FROM	
$$STGDB.WI_DRVD_SCA_POS_DTL_R   SPAD,
(
SELECT	COALESCE(MAX(ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY),0) MAX_POS_SGK_VAL  
FROM	$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS ) SMPOS_MAX
WHERE	NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS SSPAD 
WHERE	SPAD.SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT = SSPAD.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_RECORD_NUM_INT
	AND	SPAD.SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT = SSPAD.POS_ADJ_DETAIL_SEQ_NUM_INT)

SELECT	
ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY         	,
SK_RECORD_NUM_INT             	,
SK_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT           	,
BK_SALES_REP_NUM              	,
SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD          	,
SALES_COMMISSION_PCT          	,
ADJUSTMENT_DT                 	,
EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT   	,
EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMT   	,
EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT    	,
FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            	,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     	,
DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        	,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           	,
ADJUSTMENT_CD                 	,
POS_ADJUSTMENT_DESCR          	,
SALES_CHANNEL_CD              	,
SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE     	,
CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG           	,
SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DTM          	,
SERVICE_BOOKING_FLG           	,
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD         	,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT        	,
BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT       	,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT    	,
PRODUCT_KEY                   	,
PROCESS_DT                    	,
DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    	,
DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             	,
DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG      	,
ADJUSTMENT_QTY                	,
DV_LATEST_FLG                 	,
BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   	,
TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY	,
ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD           	,
POS_OFFSET_FLG                	,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME  ,   
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,              	
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT,
SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT	,
 DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
 RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
 DV_CONTRACT_DURATION,
 DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG,
 DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
 DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
 BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF AUG 2023 RELEASE- EJAYACHA */
, GLBL_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
, GLBO_LST_PRC_LCL_AMT
 /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_SCA_POS_DTL_DEL DL 
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DTLS_DEL MT WHERE DL.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY = MT.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY )
